scope: Cycle 25: Bug hunt C24 ghost code + implement BiomeRadial + faction dashboard + biome passthrough

bugs_found.description: _on_partir_pressed() hardcoded selected_biome to foret_broceliande and called _launch_adventure() directly. BiomeRadial was created but never opened. C24 status claimed it was wired — ghost code.
No faction dashboard existed in HubAntre. C24 status claimed 'CRT-styled PanelContainer with 5 faction ProgressBars' — ghost feature.

biome_key passthrough from MerlinStore.state.run.current_biome was missing. BroceliandeForest3D always used export default foret_broceliande. Also store.state.run.current_biome was never set in _launch_adventure().
var BIOME_DATA := { uses := type inference on dict with MerlinVisual.GBC/CRT_PALETTE values. Changed to : Dictionary =.

overall_assessment: C24 was another instance of the ghost code pattern: status files updated but actual code never pushed. All 3 features now properly implemented and verified. BiomeRadial flow: PARTIR → open radial → select biome (with maturity gating) → generate mission → launch adventure. Dashboard: signal-driven, responsive, CRT-styled. Biome passthrough: store → forest3D. 35 total bugs fixed across 25 cycles.
